receivedPermissions.description: blacklist addresses, freezing any interactions with the USDC token for them.

entries.name: GatewayMinter
entries.description: Entrypoint or minter of USDC on this chain for the Gateway protocol.

attestationSigners.description: Brigde validators, trusted to sign each minting payload on an incoming bridge tx.

receivedPermissions.description: pause the USDC token (no transfers, mints, burns).

entries.name: GatewayWallet
entries.description: Exit point or burner of USDC on this chain for the Gateway protocol.

attestationSigners.description: Brigde validators, trusted to sign each burning payload on an outbound bridge tx.

entries.name: TokenMinter
entries.description: Part of CCTP: Used for automated access control for minting.

receivedPermissions.description: manage all critical roles like pausers, blacklisters, minters, rescuer.

entries.name: TokenMinterV2
entries.description: Part of CCTP: Used for automated access control for minting.
